name: Clark Co. YMCA
description: Clark Co. YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Jeffersonville, IN. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms. Reservations are available.

name: Goodbounce Pickleball Yard - Clarksville
description: Goodbounce Pickleball Yard - Clarksville is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Clarksville, IN. There are 6 indoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Reservations are available. Amenities include lights, trainers or lessons, water, restrooms, locker rooms, food, and a pro shop or equipment store.

name: Lottie Oglesby Park
description: Lottie Oglesby Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Jeffersonville, IN. There are 16 outdoor concrete and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights, restrooms, and water. The courts are free.

name: Memphis Private Court
description: Memphis Private Court is a place to play pickleball in Memphis, IN. There are 8 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.

name: Mosley Park
description: Mosley Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sellersburg, IN. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: Nachand Fieldhouse
description: Come play pickleball at Nachand Fieldhouse in Jeffersonville, IN! There are 2 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Pickleball Euphoria - Clarksville
description: Come play pickleball at Pickleball Euphoria - Clarksville in Sellersburg, IN! There are 10 indoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, food, trainers or lessons, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
open_play_schedule: PE Clarksville is open daily for hourly court rentals from 8am to 10pm. Paid membership is not required. Courts are rented on an hourly basis and everyone is welcome to play at PE! Love an extra challenge? Checkout our Mixer schedule each week. Organized King/Queen of the Court style, it's 2 hours of competitive play and you get to play with someone different each game.

name: Ray Lawrence Park
description: Ray Lawrence Park is a place to play pickleball in Clarksville, IN. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Spring Hill Envision Center
description: Come play pickleball at Spring Hill Envision Center in Jeffersonville, IN! There are 6 hard courts. 2 are indoors and 4 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms and lights. The courts are free.
